deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p staticfiles && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py seed_data && python manage.py shell -c "from apps.accounts.models import User; User.objects.filter(email='mrdamrongsakn@gmail.com').delete(); u=User.objects.create_superuser(email='mrdamrongsakn@gmail.com', username='mrdamrongsakn', password='48rH2%36#'); print(f'Created superuser: {u.email}')" && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 3 --timeout 120
